text:
error is:

configure:34643: c++ -o conftest -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasin
g -I/usr/local/include  -lpthread -L/usr/local/lib -liconv -fstack-protector  -l
rt  -lmagic -L/usr/local/lib conftest.cpp -lffmpegthumbnailer  -lcurl  >&5
/usr/local/lib/libffmpegthumbnailer.so: undefined reference to `std::ctype<char>
::_M_widen_init() const@GLIBCXX_3.4.11'
